message:
fix(types): compute total_source_symbols from object_size/symbol_size, not blocks*per_block

ObjectParams::total_source_symbols() was computing source_blocks * symbols_per_block,
which overcounts for multi-block objects where the last block is partial.
The correct count is ceil(object_size / symbol_size). This also fixes
min_symbols_for_decode() which delegates to total_source_symbols().

Previously failing test: object_params_partial_last_block_does_not_overcount_total_symbols
(expected 255 but got 256 with 4 blocks of 64 symbols each for 326,400 bytes / 1280 bytes per symbol).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
